title: ExecutiveInitRequest
description: POST /internal/working-memory/init request — the goal-authority write path (ACP RW-6). Freezes the charter for a session. Response is 204 (no body). RV-M8: `user_id` MUST be a SERVER-AUTHENTICATED identity (the caller asserts it under the internal-service token), never a client-supplied field. The `charter` reuses the canonical working_memory charter (no drift — ACP-6).
